title: Introduction to Workplace Hazards
summary: A one-hour primer on the five hazard categories every employee should recognise — physical, chemical, biological, ergonomic, and psychosocial.

title: HACCP in Ten Minutes
summary: A rapid video walk-through of the seven HACCP principles, with a downloadable one-pager for kitchen supervisors.

title: Fire Warden Essentials
summary: What every nominated fire warden must know before their first drill — routes, refuge, roll call, and portable-extinguisher selection.

title: CPR & AED Refresher
summary: A 20-minute refresher for first aiders between their annual in-person requalifications. Covers adult, child and infant protocols.

title: ISO 45001 Clause Walkthrough
summary: A clause-by-clause reading guide that turns the standard into plain language — perfect for implementation leads and internal auditors.

title: ESG for HSE Teams
summary: A four-part audio series on why sustainability reporting is landing on HSE desks — and how to get ahead of it.

title: Behavioural Safety Foundations
summary: How leading indicators, observation programmes and stop-work authority actually change site behaviour — without a single poster.

title: Permit-to-Work 101
summary: The mechanics of a defensible permit-to-work system — issuer, acceptor, interlocks, and common failure modes.
